```{r}
immune_genes.names = c("S100A7", "R3HDML", "IL19", "NRAS", "BMP1", "S100A11", "HMOX1", "PAK1", "S100A16", "VEGFA", "NDRG1", "CSF1")

tabelle_immune_genes = data.frame(immune.genes = immune_genes.names)

print(tabelle_immune_genes)
```

FIltering for gene ids:
```{r}
library(biomaRt)
library(AnnotationDbi)

ensembl = useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")

immune_genes.table2 = getBM(filters= "external_gene_name", attributes= c("ensembl_gene_id", 
          "external_gene_name", "description","gene_biotype"), 
          values = tabelle_immune_genes$immune.genes, mart= ensembl)


dim(immune_genes.table2)
print(immune_genes.table2)
```
check whether the selected genes also occur in our data set:
```{r}
anzahl_gemeinsame_gene = sum(rownames(luad.tumor_filtered_proteins) %in% immune_genes.table2$ensembl_gene_id)
print(anzahl_gemeinsame_gene)
```
all genes are also represented in our dataset.
